title: Windows Software (Ricoh Utilities and XPS Driver) for Specific Ricoh MFPs and Printers - Potential Privilege Escalation
explanation: A potential privilege escalation vulnerability has been identified in Ricoh software, specifically Ricoh Utilities and the XPS driver running on Windows.
affect:
This vulnerability may allow an attacker to gain elevated privileges (e.g., administrator rights), which could enable them to:
- Access or modify sensitive data
- Change system configurations
- Execute malicious code
checkVersion:
To check the version of each software on Windows:

 

Ricoh Utilities
Launch Ricoh Utilities, then click the "i" button at the bottom of the window.

 

XPS Driver
Open Printing Preferences, then click the Support button at the bottom left.
measures:
Please uninstall the existing Ricoh Utilities and XPS driver from your Windows system, then install the latest versions from the following URL:
https://support.ricoh.com/bb/html/dr_ut_e/re2/model/sp230sfnw/sp230sfnw.htm

- To uninstall Ricoh Utilities, launch the application, go to the Tools menu, and click the Uninstall button.
- To download the latest Ricoh Utilities, go to the Printer Driver tab on the page above, then select Drivers and Utilities.
- To download the latest XPS driver, go to the Printer Driver tab on the page above, then select Driver for XPS.
contact: Please contact your local Ricoh representative or dealer if you have any queries.
authenticityGuarantee: Please note that any copy or paraphrase of the text of this document that differs in content from the distribution URL link, or omits the URL, is an uncontrolled copy and may lack important information or contain factual errors.
